title: Brent oil tops $118 after Trump says he will blockade Iran until nuclear deal
snippet: Brent crude surged 7%+ to $119.20 per barrel, WTI near $104-108. Oil jumped after Trump told Axios he would maintain the naval blockade until Iran agrees to a nuclear deal. Highest since June 2022.
tag_reason: Oil price surge to $119 is a new high driven by Trump's blockade-until-nuclear-deal statement on 4/29
